## Coherent Jumps 13.1% After AI-Driven Q4 2026 Guidance Beats Estimates

COHR's guidance beat is a high-confidence signal that optical transceiver demand from AI data center buildout remains robust — a direct read-through for networking infrastructure beneficiaries more broadly. A 13.1% move on guidance alone suggests the market was meaningfully underestimating the AI pull-through velocity in this segment.

- COHR stock rose 13.1% following Q4 2026 guidance that topped estimates.
- The guidance beat is attributed to AI-driven demand, consistent with optical transceiver pull from data center buildout.
- The headline explicitly asks whether the bull case has fundamentally changed, implying the move is large enough to reassess positioning.
- Single-outlet coverage; the magnitude of the move suggests broad market acknowledgment.
